subcodes.first_line: O thou who hast circumambulated the luminous Sanctuary! Give thanks unto God that thou hast traversed a thousand leagues and, like the desert wind, hast journeyed far [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای طائف بقعه نوراء شکر کن خدا را که هزار فرسنگ طی نمودی و مانند باد بادیه
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @rendering assistance to God; victory [nusrat], @love of God, @spiritual transformation, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
